declared_unit: The processing of hot rolled, pickled low carbon steel strip into cold rolled steel using a 6HI Single Stand Reversing Cold Rolling Mill during a expected lifetime of 30 years under the specified operational set-up.
note: This EPD follows the PCR 2022:09 (Presses for working metal) and reports results by life-cycle phase (Upstream / Core / Downstream), not by EN 15804 modules A1-A3. There is no A1-A3 production-stage column, so A1-A3 GWP values cannot be extracted. For reference, total cradle-to-grave GWP-total is 3.12E+08 kg CO2 eq. per declared unit (Upstream 9.27E+06, Core 2.76E+06, Downstream 3.00E+08). The 'Upstream' phase (cradle-to-gate) GWP-total is 9.27E+06 and GWP-fossil 9.16E+06, but these are not equivalent to A1-A3.
